name: Babe Russin
abstract: Irving "Babe" Russin (June 18, 1911 – August 4, 1984) was an American tenor saxophone player.

about_quotes.speaker: Cliff Leeman
about_quotes.evidence: And we had Babe Russin in that band, he's a great tenor saxophone player

about_quotes.speaker: Leonard Phillips
about_quotes.evidence: [INTERVIEWER] I think I heard that. Maybe Babe Russin might have been on it -- tenor player. [INTERVIEWEE] No, there wasn't no tenor on this one.

about_quotes.speaker: Patricia Willard
about_quotes.evidence: The interviewer mentions Babe Russin in a note, but the interviewee does not mention him or confirm any personal interaction.

about_quotes.speaker: Red Callender
about_quotes.evidence: Babe Russin, "All the Things You Are", "Like Someone In Love."
